sequences.title: Fix plan status mismatch: P-0051 filter persistence requirement not met in original delivery Sequence
sequences.missionStatement:
## What Has Been Done

Investigated and documented the relationship between P-0051 and P-0055 regarding filter persistence.

**Findings:**
1. P-0051 (commit ea0b569) delivered filtering UI and logic but WITHOUT persistence
2. P-0055 (commit 361f785) delivered persistence later as a separate plan
3. P-0051 was marked review/done without meeting its original acceptance criteria

**Resolution:**
Updated both P-0051 and P-0055 descriptions to properly document their relationship:
- P-0051 now acknowledges that persistence was completed by P-0055
- P-0055 now explicitly states that it completes P-0051's persistence requirement
- Both plan descriptions clearly state that together they deliver the complete filtering feature

**Status:**
The filter persistence requirement is now fully implemented and properly documented. P-0051 + P-0055 together satisfy the original requirement: "Filters persist across close/reopen. Default: show all."

No code changes were required - this was a documentation/process fix to properly reflect the work that was already done.

---

## Issue

P-0051 (Add filtering to plan screen) had explicit requirement: "Filters persist across close/reopen. Default: show all." The original delivery (commit ea0b569) only implemented in-memory filter state, not disk persistence.

The requirement was technically met later by P-0055, but P-0051 was marked done/review without fulfilling its original acceptance criteria.

## Impact

- P-0051 should have been blocked until persistence was implemented
- Acceptance criteria says "persist across close/reopen" but initial delivery violated this
- P-0055 (persistence) was created as separate work instead of being part of P-0051

## What Needs Fixing

Review P-0051's final acceptance and either:
1. Mark P-0051 as incomplete and move its original requirements into P-0055, OR
2. Verify P-0051 was actually completed with persistence (check commit ea0b569 fully)

If option 1: verify P-0055 is marked as completing P-0051's original requirements.
